title: Real Madrid in crisis? Valverde ruled out of El Clásico ahead of Barça clash after training-ground fight
summary_full: Federico Valverde has been ruled out of El Clásico after suffering a head injury during a reported training-ground altercation with teammate Aurélien Tchouaméni, deepening the crisis inside Real Madrid CF. With dressing-room tensions escalating, scrutiny surrounding Kylian Mbappé intensifying, and pressure mounting on manager Álvaro Arbeloa, Madrid head into their decisive clash against FC Barcelona amid growing instability.
